text: A portal moves objects inside a box to another box in another place.
Adds a hook that a new world can find to hook up the other side of a portal.

params: The dimensions of the portal box.

text: Finds the portal position that has the best path to the given world.
params: The world id we wanna get a path towards.
The position we wanna get a path from.
return: The position of the portal, and the portal with the shortest path to the given world.

text: Finds and pops world hook for this world if present.
params: The world to look in (Optional, defaults to world from script context)
return: The portal. Nil if nothing was found.

text: Transfers objects inside one B opening to the B opening of another portal.
Can be used to make elevators with several floors.
Portal sizes and opening A must match (world, position and rotation).
params: A [sm.physics.filter] mask selecting which contents to transfer. Only [sm.physics.filter, dynamicBody], [sm.physics.filter, staticBody] and [sm.physics.filter, character] are meaningful. Defaults to transferring bodies and characters. (Optional)
return: True if successful, false on failure.
